description: A78/H() runs a hidden per-agent background summarization API call on a timer ([AgentSummary] Timer fired) that burns tokens silently every interval. Short-circuit H() to return before any API call; timer still self-reschedules harmlessly but does no work.

patches.search_regex: async function H\(\)\{if\(\$\)return;E\(`\[AgentSummary\] Timer fired for agent \$\{K\}`\);
patches.replace: async function H(){if($)return;E(`[AgentSummary] Timer fired for agent ${K}`);return;
patches.description: Early-return before the hidden summary API call
